docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULLBRIGHT, NICHELLE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF NICHELLE FULLBRIGHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARTURO NEVAREZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, ARTURO (COMPTON AUTO SALES)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FULLBRIGHT, NICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, ARTURO (COMPTON AUTO SALES) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULLBRIGHT, NICHELLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FULLBRIGHT, NICHELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, ARTURO (COMPTON AUTO SALES) PLAINTIFF SIGNED AN "AS IS" PURCHASE CONTRACT AND WAS INFORMED THAT THE VEHICLE HAD A "SALVAGE" DESIGNATION ON ITS TITLE BEFORE SHE AGREED TO BUY IT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FULLBRIGHT, NICHELLE
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-02-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
